utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Each item is fully specified: destination (Prague) is given, travel_dates (2024-06-20 to 2024-06-24) are specific, transportation includes flight details and cost, accommodation includes hotel name and cost, activities include descriptions and cost, additional_services include dinner and cost, and total_budget is provided with the total amount. Therefore, all 7 out of 7 items are covered and fully specified.
